title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Man Infraconstruction - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Man Infraconstruction - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Man Infraconstruction. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
